role_summary: the risk & compliance m anager identifies, assesses, and mitigates financial and regulatory  risks within the organization.
responsibilities: • develop and implement risk management frameworks   • monitor regulatory compliance across functions   • conduct compliance audits and risk asse ssments   • report risk exposure to senior management   • ensure internal controls and governance standards   • support regulatory inspections and audits
qualifications: • qualified ca   • knowledge of risk management and compliance frameworks   • strong analytical and  governance skills   • stakeholder management capability
